description_long: This is a Daikin outdoor air conditioning unit, typically used for residential or small commercial buildings. The main body is a rectangular metal box with a large front grille protecting the fan, and several visible labels and stickers, including a blue and green Daikin logo. The unit is mounted on a flat wall, with insulated pipes and electrical conduits emerging from the rear and connecting to the building. The sides feature additional venting slats for airflow, while the back is mostly flat against the wall with mounting brackets and some weathering visible. The surface is predominantly off-white with signs of dirt and exposure to the elements, and the overall construction appears robust and industrial.
description: A wall-mounted Daikin outdoor air conditioning unit with a large front grille, visible piping, and weathered off-white metal casing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large protective grille, Daikin logo, and main intake area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the unit, visible insulated pipes, and wall mounting.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat mounting plate, wall attachment points, and some weathering.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the vented slats and additional piping connections.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular blue and green Daikin logo is visible on the upper right of the front grille.
attribute_grille_pattern: The front grille consists of closely spaced horizontal and vertical slats forming a rectangular grid pattern.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Exhaust vents are located on the right side, featuring vertical louvered slats for directional airflow.
